feed.title: AO3 - Damian Wayne/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Damian Wayne/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: It's Only Love, Nobody Dies
entry.summary:
Author: vivid_dreamer7

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,215Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Meeting at the age of 6, you and Damian have been inseperable since… much to his feigned displeasure. Now, 12 years later, adulthood is hitting you and being a senior in high school is kicking your ass. On top of that, hook-up culture has gone mainstream leaving you with an extreme case of FOMO. 18 and still haven't had our first kiss? Not on your watch. And who better to ask to have your first kiss with than your best friend who is also inexperienced? It's only one kiss. … Right? ~Join our hormonal teens as they navigate a world neither of them truly understand: romance and healthy relationships. Will they be able to get out of this hellhole they both jumped headfirst in? Or will this decision ruin their friendship forever?~

entry.title: Out of Touch | Damian Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: youngirlfrom

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,581Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: ɞ You're reaching out for something to hold, and looking for a love where the climate is cold. Trying to feel life amidst manic moves and drowsy dreams. You and him, soul alone. And soul really matters to you, too much.

entry.title: Beware the Nightmares on the Land and Sea
entry.summary:
Author: HotaruKurosawa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 180,760Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 174

Summary: One day, your life took a turn. For better or worse, you haven't decided yet. What you do know is that there are things on this planet that you never even knew existed. Things that your mind could never even imagine. Yet, here you are. Now, you must rebuild your life whilst trying to navigate this new one involving heroes and villains alike. Not to mention navigating the normal world and the magic one, as you possess a power that others could only dream of having. Whilst you are uncertain of how to navigate these changes in your life, these few things are certain. Don't go into the water past your knees.If you saw something that seemed abnormal, no you didn't.If you hear voices in your head, it will pass. Don't fully trust their advice.No matter what you do with your life, remember, it's not just yours that hangs in the balance.And lastly, whatever you do, don't have sex. These are the things you have to follow by to get through this life. If you don't, it won't be just you who deals with the consequences. Oh, and don't forget. The Eldritch Being inside of your chest is watching everything you do. Try not to disappoint her. Your Choices Matter.

entry.title: And whatever souls are made of (ours are made of the same)
entry.summary:
Author: thenyoumightaswellwrestleangels

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,598Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: "There doesn't have to be anything wrong," Damian says slowly, and you wonder when he had to become so careful with you. You wonder if loving someone means treating them like glass - and maybe that's why you're so bad at it. "But if there is, I'd rather know." "To what end?" you ask softly. "So that I can know you again, the way I did before I loved you."

entry.summary:

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,525Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: synopsis: you and damian first met as children, being introduced to each other as future spouses. bad first impressions and animosity follow the both of you when you reunite as adults, only days before your wedding. despite yourself, you begin to warm up to damian which does nothing to his icy exterior, but melts the heart it so desperately tries to protect.

entry.title: Welcome to Gotham MD
entry.summary:
Author: Geminimini

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,425Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: It’s always great to work at Gotham Hospital. People higher than the Empire State Building in the building next door, guys involved in territory fights upstairs in ICU. Don’t forget the kids that go around throwing whatever they can get their hands on in Peds. Add to the fact you’re the child of the famous vigilante and part of the family, there isn’t a single day that passes by as boring. Who needed that anyways, right?

entry.title: Deranged
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,019Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 425

Summary: "In all honestly? It was his fault."Which all the Gotham untouchable family in the light and untouchable vigilantes at night. However, it all stopped by a single man, a citizen, a civilian no less with no background in anything besides school.No martial arts, no combat training or survival training. The guy is just a guy and that is a problem too. Well not for all of them but still something they aren't too eager to accept.Not yet at least, however they aren't willing to settle these feelings for [M/N].

entry.title: The robin and the jellyfish
entry.summary:
Author: Bellies_wellies

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,627Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 116

Summary: After defeating Gaea, Pandora Jackson, younger sister of Percy, returns to her quote-on-quote “normal life” at Gotham Academy. Going through the normal teenage angst mixed with serious PTSD and stuck-up rich kids, she’s got enough problems to deal with. So having Damian Wayne, her “mutually beneficial acquaintance,” walk in on her fighting a monster—and him being able to see it—causes a whole lot more problems. Nothing in life has ever been easy, but it’d be nice to catch some sort of a break. Will she remain just acquaintances with Damian? Will he share his secret and traumas? Or will their tentative friendship end with the new challenges thrown their way? (Title is subject to change cause I suck at naming things lol)
